scripts.harness:lint: pnpm --dir ai-agent-design-system run lint && pnpm --dir projects/project-1 run lint
scripts.harness:typecheck: pnpm --dir ai-agent-design-system exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --dir projects/project-1 exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.harness:build: pnpm --dir ai-agent-design-system run build && pnpm --dir projects/project-1 run build
scripts.harness:registry: pnpm --dir ai-agent-design-system run registry:build && pnpm run check:registry-consistency
scripts.harness:verify: pnpm run harness:verify:design-system && pnpm run harness:verify:consumer && pnpm run harness:verify:governance && pnpm run harness:verify:harness
scripts.harness:verify:design-system: pnpm run check:port-contract && pnpm run check:primitive-preview-sync && pnpm run harness:registry && pnpm --dir ai-agent-design-system run build
scripts.harness:verify:consumer: pnpm run check:consumer-boundary && pnpm run check:token-usage && pnpm --dir projects/project-1 run build
scripts.harness:verify:governance: pnpm run check:docs-integrity && pnpm run check:governance-consistency
